title: Simple Incubator
description: This mod adds a simple machine that allows one to incubate creature's eggs.
body:
![Mod title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b327983f76b39e98d0cc21a18dfebe1291236af3.png)

As the name suggests, it's a simple mod that adds a single machine: an egg incubator. And that's is it!

## **FEATURES**

With it, you can incubate any egg. You heard right: any egg.

By default, the mod offers the option to incubate any vanilla egg. Including those that are not considered to be spawn eggs. And, if you want to add any other egg to it, you can make a datapack and add more eggs easily.

Because of that, the regular spawn egg behavior have been deactivated, so you can use the machine to hatch said eggs. But you can change that in the config file, if you want.

I tried to make this mod as config friendly as possible.

And it's fully compatible with other energy mods that uses the FE system.

## **CONFIGURABLE**

- You can enable/disable the spawn egg drop from mobs.

- You can change how often a mob will drop their spawn eggs upon death.

- You can change how long you have to wait for an egg to hatch.

- You can enable/disable the mobspawner drop, when you break one.

- You can create a datapack to include any egg to the default spawn list.



<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/CsxC6XGRqvY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



## **FUTURE PLANS**

I planning to add a way to tweak the eggs to favor your needs.

You will be able to change attributes of the creatures these altered eggs will generate.

Want to have weaker mobs? That would be able to do easily.

Want mobs to have less life? Doable as well.

Want them to have more strength, more speed, or be blind, or even poisoned at the moment of the spawn?

Just do it right away!

And then you will be able to have the perfect mobspawner right at reach of your fingers. Inside your base.

But, until then...



That's it for now, guys.

I hope you like this little mod. Tell me if you think there is any potential in this mod.

And don't exitate to report any bugs or errors.
